---
title: "Articles"
---

## Available Articles

| Report | Description | Links |
|---|---|---|
| Matching Methods Report | Main report on exact matching, coarsened exact matching, and entropy balancing for causal inference. | [Article](matching_methods_report.qmd) · [Full code](matching_methods_report_full_code.qmd) · [QA log](matching_methods_report_qa_log.qmd) |
| WeightIt Entropy Balancing Notes | Detailed notes on what entropy-based weighting is, how `method = "ebal"` works in `WeightIt`, and how to tune `moments`, `int`, `quantile`, and diagnostics. | [Article](weightit_entropy_balancing_notes.html) |
| LaLonde Background Appendix | Compact background notes on why the LaLonde benchmark still matters for matching and observational causal inference. | [Article](lalonde_background_appendix.qmd) |
| Synthesis Report | Comparative synthesis of the main report against *The Mixtape*, *The Effect*, and Gertler chapter 8. | [Article](matching_synthesis_report.qmd) |
| Mixtape NSW Benchmark Notes | Compact notes from section `5.3.4` onward of *The Mixtape*, focused on observational versus experimental comparisons with runnable R code. | [Article](mixtape_nsw_benchmark_notes.qmd) |
| Notes on *The Effect*: Matching | Scaffolded chapter notes for *The Effect*, Chapter 14, organized for later synthesis and repo cross-walk work. | [Article](effectbook_matching_notes.qmd) |
| Notes on *The Mixtape*: Matching and Subclassification | Scaffolded chapter notes for *The Mixtape*, Chapter 5, organized for later study-note expansion and repo cross-walk work. | [Article](mixtape_matching_subclassification_notes.qmd) |
| Notes on Gertler et al.: Matching | Scaffolded chapter notes for Chapter 8 of `gertler_impact_evaluation.pdf`, organized for later study-note expansion and repo cross-walk work. | [Article](gertler_matching_notes.qmd) |

## Source Cross-Walk

| Source or need | Best entry point | Supporting repo item |
|---|---|---|
| Design-first comparison of exact matching, CEM, and entropy balancing | [Matching Methods Report](matching_methods_report.qmd) | [LaLonde Main Report Lab](../labs/lalonde_main_report_lab.qmd) · [Full code](matching_methods_report_full_code.qmd) · [QA log](matching_methods_report_qa_log.qmd) |
| Detailed WeightIt guide for entropy balancing and parameter tuning | [WeightIt Entropy Balancing Notes](weightit_entropy_balancing_notes.html) | [Matching Methods Report](matching_methods_report.qmd) · [LaLonde Main Report Lab](../labs/lalonde_main_report_lab.qmd) |
| Historical background on why `lalonde` is a benchmark dataset | [LaLonde Background Appendix](lalonde_background_appendix.qmd) | [LaLonde Main Report Lab](../labs/lalonde_main_report_lab.qmd) |
| DAG-based covariate selection and bad-controls mistakes | [Matching Methods Report (Appendix A)](matching_methods_report.qmd#appendix-a-dag-and-bad-controls-companion) | [Matching Methods Report](matching_methods_report.qmd) |
| Compare the main report against *The Mixtape*, *The Effect*, and Gertler chapter 8 | [Synthesis Report](matching_synthesis_report.qmd) | [Articles hub](index.qmd) |
| Propensity-score weighting as a compact extension to the main report | [Matching Methods Report (Appendix B)](matching_methods_report.qmd#appendix-b-propensity-score-weighting-companion) | [Notes on *The Effect*: Matching](effectbook_matching_notes.qmd) |
| Mixtape section `5.3.4` onward with runnable NSW benchmark code | [Mixtape NSW Benchmark Notes](mixtape_nsw_benchmark_notes.qmd) | [NSW + CPS Benchmark Lab](../labs/nsw_cps_benchmark_lab.qmd) |
| Subclassification as the conceptual precursor to matching | [Notes on *The Mixtape*: Matching and Subclassification](mixtape_matching_subclassification_notes.qmd) | [Notes on *The Mixtape*: Matching and Subclassification](mixtape_matching_subclassification_notes.qmd) |
| NSW benchmark logic for observational adjustment | [Notes on *The Mixtape*: Matching and Subclassification](mixtape_matching_subclassification_notes.qmd) | [NSW + CPS Benchmark Lab](../labs/nsw_cps_benchmark_lab.qmd) |
| Matching inside an evaluator decision workflow with matched DiD escalation | [Notes on Gertler et al.: Matching](gertler_matching_notes.qmd) | [HISP IE in Practice Lab](../labs/hisp_ie_practice_lab.qmd) |
| Entropy balancing and weighting-first interpretation | [Notes on *The Effect*: Matching](effectbook_matching_notes.qmd) | [Black Politicians Lab](../labs/black_politicians_lab.qmd) |
